title: melanolepis calcosa
intro: Melanolepis calcosa, also known as the Calcutta fern, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. The medicinal properties of Melanolepis calcosa include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Melanolepis calcosa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from fever to digestive issues.
